response: The iPhone 15 Pro features a 6.1-inch OLED display, powered by the A17 Pro chip, and boasts a 48MP main camera, a 3274mAh battery, and storage options ranging from 128GB to 1TB. Weighing just 187g, it is priced at $999 and has received a strong 4.6/5 rating from users. This premium smartphone combines cutting-edge performance with a sleek, lightweight design.
